base_path = "abfss://filesysmhk@sasynapsemhk.dfs.core.windows.net/output"

for c in countries:

    df.filter(df.country == c) \
        .coalesce(1) \
        .write.mode("overwrite") \
        .option("header", True) \
        .csv(f"{base_path}/{c}")

for c in countries:
    
    df_country = df.filter(df.country == c)
    
    df_country.coalesce(1).write \
        .mode("overwrite") \
        .option("header", True) \
        .csv(f"output/{c}")

df = spark.read.format("csv") \
    .option("header", True) \
    .load("abfss://filesysmhk@sasynapsemhk.dfs.core.windows.net/raw/countryfile.csv")


countries = [row["country"] for row in df.select("country").distinct().collect()]

base_path = "abfss://filesysmhk@sasynapsemhk.dfs.core.windows.net/output"


for c in countries:

    temp_path = f"{base_path}/{c}_temp"
    final_path = f"{base_path}/{c}.csv"

    # Step 1 write temp folder
    df.filter(df.country == c) \
        .coalesce(1) \
        .write.mode("overwrite") \
        .option("header", True) \
        .csv(temp_path)

    # Step 2 get part file
    files = mssparkutils.fs.ls(temp_path)

    part_file = [f.path for f in files if f.path.endswith(".csv")][0]

    # Step 3 move to final file
    mssparkutils.fs.mv(part_file, final_path, True)

    # Step 4 delete temp folder
    mssparkutils.fs.rm(temp_path, True)
